prompt:
A single tiny glowing firefly orb on solid black background #000000. Square format. The orb is centered, occupying ~25% of frame.

Subject: A soft luminous round particle with a glowing cyan-green core #9CF0BD, slightly warm halo blending to gold #C0A35D at the very edge, surrounded by a soft diffuse outer glow that fades smoothly to pure black. The center is bright, the glow falls off radially in a clean photographic bokeh fashion. No internal structure, no pattern, no shape variation — just a smooth glowing dot.

Purpose: This will be cut out and used as a small particle sprite (firefly) duplicated across UI backgrounds with CSS opacity and animation.

Avoid: insects, wings, legs, body, any creature anatomy, neon harsh lines, multiple particles, lens flares with rays, geometric shapes, oversaturation.
